overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring the interior of a rustic stone cottage with wooden beams and a thatched roof. The character walks through a cozy living space featuring a fireplace, wooden furniture, and a loft area, with natural light filtering through windows with blue curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage entrance and kitchen area

events.description: character moves past window with blue curtains, increasing natural light on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cottage interior, observing the shelves and furniture near the entrance

entered.detail: heavy wooden plank door with iron hinges at the entrance
tall wooden shelving unit with pottery and baskets
rustic wooden dining table with stools
tall white candles in holders on the table
light blue fabric curtains tied at the windows
red wooden wall clock with gold details between two windows

segments.scene_description: The character begins exploring a cozy stone cottage interior, moving from the entrance past wooden shelves and tables. Natural light filters through windows with blue curtains as the character approaches a wall clock, revealing the rustic kitchen area with candles and wooden furniture.

events.description: character approaches the stone fireplace with burning fire and hanging cauldron

agents.ego_description: walking past the fireplace toward the back of the room, examining the wood pile and furniture

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and cooking pot
large black iron cauldron hanging over the fire
stacked firewood next to the fireplace
brown tufted armchair with patterned cushions
wooden mezzanine level with railing above the back wall
brass hanging lanterns with glass enclosures

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the cottage, passing a large stone fireplace with a burning fire and iron cauldron. The scene reveals a comfortable living area with upholstered armchairs and a wooden loft above, while stacked firewood sits beside the hearth.

scene_state.functional_zone: cottage living area under the mezzanine

events.description: character stops walking and looks upward at the wooden loft and thatched ceiling

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the wooden mezzanine and thatched roof structure, then turning back toward the fireplace

entered.detail: exposed thatched roofing visible through the wooden ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character examines the upper level of the cottage, looking up at the wooden loft railing and thatched roof structure. After observing the mezzanine, the character turns back, providing another view of the fireplace and windows as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic stone cottage, transitioning from a sunlit kitchen area into a cozy living space and finally toward the upper architectural details. It begins at the entrance, gliding past wooden shelves and tables while natural light filters through blue curtains toward a wall clock in the kitchen. As the camera moves deeper into the home, the scene shifts toward the warmth of a large stone fireplace with a burning fire and iron cauldron, revealing upholstered armchairs and stacked firewood. The perspective then tilts upward to examine the wooden railing of the mezzanine and the thatched roof structure above. Finally, the camera turns back to provide a sweeping view of the hearth and windows, completing the exploration of the interior.
